This repo uses multiple pull request templates.

Pick the one that matches your change:

- `?template=feature.md`
- `?template=bugfix.md`
- `?template=chore.md`
- `?template=docs.md`
- `?template=hotfix.md`
- `?template=infra.md`
- `?template=data-service.md`

See GitHub docs on using the `template` query param.
